= Native Plugin Support Matrix

What each vendored plugin needs to run under Terminus. Tiers build on each
other; every tier assumes the `support/` shims.

== Tier 0 — working now

[options="header"]
|===
| Plugin | Auth | Notes
| days_left_until | none | Pure date math. Verified end to end (screen PNG).
| hacker_news     | none | Public Firebase API via HTTParty. Verified render.
| weather         | none | Core never published its Ruby; reimplemented in
                          `support/weather_plugin.rb` against keyless Open-Meteo.
                          All four layouts verified live. Settings: `lat`/`lng`,
                          `units` (metric/imperial).
| route_planner   | API key (user) | Upstream ships only a hardcoded stub (and
                          it doesn't parse on Ruby 4.0). Reimplemented in
                          `support/route_planner_plugin.rb` against
                          OpenRouteService — geocode + directions with
                          alternatives. Settings: `api_key`, `origin`,
                          `destination`, `mode`. No key → graceful failure
                          (no more fake routes).
|===

== Configuration UI

All plugins with a schema in `support/registry.rb` (13 so far) are
configurable from the extension form: pick *Native* kind, choose the plugin
and layout, fill in the settings fields. Plugins without a schema fall back to
the raw `data` JSON editor.

== Tier 1 — need shared shim additions only

Unlocked by: `Base#fetch`/`Base#post` (Core's HTTP helpers, HTTParty-backed),
view helpers (`l`, `number_with_delimiter`, `number_to_currency`, `pluralize`),
real i18n (date formats + plugin keys), ENV-backed credentials stub.

[options="header"]
|===
| Plugin | Auth | Extra needs
| mondrian        | none           | Pure generative layout.
| lunar_calendar  | none           | `l`/`t` with `locale:`, moon-phase locale keys.
| screenshot      | none           | `addressable` gem; `nokogiri` (already transitive).
| ics_calendar    | URL (user)     | `icalendar` gem, `Base#fetch`.
| chatgpt         | API key (user) | `Base#post`.
| lunch_money     | API key (user) | `Base#fetch`.
| email_meter     | token (user)   | `Base#fetch`.
| eight_sleep     | email+password (user) | `Base#fetch`/`#post`; no OAuth despite appearances.
| parcel          | API key (user) | `l` helper, parcel locale keys.
| stock_price     | server keys    | ENV: `marketdata_app`, `currency_api`.
| github_commit_graph | server key | ENV: GitHub token; `Base#post` (GraphQL).
| tempest_weather_station | server key + user station | ENV: Tempest key; `I18n.l`, `user.locale`, `plugin_setting.previous_refresh_at`, weather icon assets.
|===

== Tier 1.5 — pasted-token fast path (no OAuth flow built)

[options="header"]
|===
| Plugin | Status
| notion  | *Built.* `APIClients::Notion` reimplemented in `support/api_clients.rb`
           (api.notion.com/v1). Renders its error state cleanly without a token.
           Settings: `notion.access_token` (nested), `display_type`,
           `notion_database_id` / `notion_page_id` (format `id::name`).
| shopify | *Built.* `shopify_api` gem + lazy `ShopifyAPI::Context` bootstrap with
           placeholder app creds (Admin tokens need none). Degrades gracefully on
           bad creds. Settings: `shop`, `access_token`, `lookback_period`.
| todoist | *Blocked upstream.* Degrades gracefully, but the vendored views render
           a `todos` local (old todo_list format) while the plugin returns
           `tasks` — even a real token would crash the layout. Needs a view
           re-sync from upstream or a stub view. Also: the legacy REST v2
           endpoint now returns 410 Gone; only the v1 filter path
           (`filter_date` + `sort_grouping` + `sort_direction` set) is viable.
           Settings: `todoist.access_token` (nested).
|===

All three need a real pasted token to verify their live-data paths.

== Tier 2 — need an OAuth web flow

Requires the one missing piece of infrastructure: a redirect/callback route,
encrypted token storage on the extension, and per-provider app credentials
(ENV). The OAuth client logic itself ships in the plugins (Signet).

[options="header"]
|===
| Plugin | Gems
| google_calendar  | `signet`, `google-apis-calendar_v3`
| google_analytics | `signet`, `google-apis-analyticsdata_v1beta`
| youtube_analytics| `signet`, Google YouTube Analytics API gem
| withings         | none extra, but Core's `OauthService::Withings` must be reimplemented
|===

== Tier 3 — missing Core code, not just plumbing

[options="header"]
|===
| Plugin | Gap
| nano_banana_dashboard | Needs `user.merged_plugin_locals` (cross-plugin data merge), Gemini API, ImageMagick post-processing. Deepest Core coupling.
|===

NOTE: `weather` graduated from this tier — see Tier 0; its locals provider
was reimplemented against Open-Meteo since Core never published the original.

== Shared shim work queue

. `Base#fetch(url, headers:, timeout:, should_retry:)` / `Base#post(url, body:, headers:)` returning an HTTParty response (`.body`, `.parsed_response`).
. View helpers on the ERB context: `l`, `number_with_delimiter`, `number_to_currency`, `pluralize`.
. Replace hand-rolled `t` with the `i18n` gem (already a Terminus dependency): date formats (`:short`), `locale:` kwarg, per-plugin keys (lunar phases, parcel statuses, weather).
. Credentials stub upgrade: support `credentials.plugins[:google][:client_id]`, `credentials.plugins.weather.tempest_api_key`, `credentials.dig(...)`, `credentials.base_url`, `credentials.plugin_asset_url` — all ENV-backed (`PLUGINS_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID`, ...).
. `Setting` shim: `previous_refresh_at`, `plugin_setting` (singular) alias. `User` shim: `locale`.
. Gemfile: `icalendar`, `addressable`, `unicode-emoji`, `shopify_api`, `signet` + Google API gems (Tier 2).
. `calendar/` holds two plugins (`google_calendar`, `ics_calendar`) plus a shared helper — the loader needs a dir→plugin map for it.
|===
